title: Mostly Vanilla Client
description: Vanilla-compatible client modpack used by the MostlyVanilla Network, released for you to enjoy
body:
## What is this?
The Mostly Vanilla Client modpack is an optimized QOL vanilla-compatible modpack. Packed with the optimizations and features of [additive](https://modrinth.com/modpack/additive), it contains many quality of life changes, helping to make inventory management, travel, and communication more seamless, allowing you to focus on what matters. On top of all this, it uses several shaders, resource packs, and mods to improve the visuals and terrain generation, while trying to stay true to the vanilla feel. 
It was made to work hand in hand with my [server pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mostlyvanillaserver). 

All the features are, of course, optional, so if you don’t like a feature, or want to add your favourite mod, I’m certainly not stopping you.

***

“Can I base my modpack off of this?”, sure! Just make sure to link back to this modpack, credit additive, and follow the terms and conditions of the GNU GPL v3 linked in the "Technical Information" section

Note: this modpack contains the mod “do a barrel roll”, disabled by default. It is known to cause motion sickness in some users and can be annoying to others. If you think that it is your cup of tea, just enable it, and have fun. Otherwise, just leave it off, and play as normal

The Mostly Vanilla Client is based on [additive](https://modrinth.com/modpack/additive)
